variants.notes: The smallest valid resolution: one wing sized to the archetype's modules_required minimum (2 MOD-BED-DESK-NOOK), at the archetype's minimum footprint.

provenance.notes: Minimal reduction from the one observed sample (Map020.json, 20x17, mirrored dual wings) down to the archetype's own stated size floor and a single wing -- the same kind of straightforward, low-risk simplification as LAY-INTERIOR-INN-SPINE-CORRIDOR (the offset_l tier), just smaller. Not the directly-observed configuration; see LAY-INTERIOR-INN-ZONED-EXPANDED for that.
